assessment.note: She wants earlier cross-functional leadership room, which is a strong growth signal with some frustration about current influence and only mild residual strain. [THREAD-DEFERRED] Earlier cross-functional discussions thread noted, but drill cap forces stage advance.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Influence bottleneck
new_queue.name: What tends to slow decisions down when you need buy-in?
new_queue.description: Pinpoints the recurring dependency or interface problem that limits her influence.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into practical adjustments and support.
